routineText:
09:00 — Wake up
09:00–13:00 — Work & Water (1L)
13:00 — Black coffee + 1 tsp of sugar

14:00 — 🌅 Breakfast
  · whole wheat bread 70g
  · olive oil box of 70g for the whole week
  · mint tea + 1 tsp of sugar
  · cumin & salt

14:00–18:00 — Work & Water (1L)
18:00 — Out from work

18:00 — ☀️ Lunch
  · rice boiled (70g raw)
  · kefta cooked (250g raw) with 1/2 onion
  · 200g legume sauté (carrot, courgette, onion)

19:00 — Black coffee · Water 1L
19:00–21:00 — Rest

21:00 — 🌙 Dinner
  · 1 fruit
  · Protein + Jaouda sans lactose
  · 85g mixed nuts (almonds, walnuts, pistachios)

01:00 — Sleep
optimizedText:
14:00 — 🌅 Breakfast
  · whole wheat bread 70g
  · olive oil 10g
  · mint tea + 1 tsp of sugar
  · cumin & salt

18:00 — ☀️ Lunch
  · rice boiled (70g raw)
  · kefta cooked (250g raw) with 1/2 onion
  · 200g legume sauté (carrot, courgette, onion)

21:00 — 🌙 Dinner
  · 1 banana
  · 2 scoops whey protein + Jaouda sans lactose
  · 40g mixed nuts (almonds, walnuts, pistachios)
